Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/Paṭhamavagga/X/1.text: Vi 3. 7; Di 2. 31; Ma 1. 224; Ma 2. 291; Saṁ 1. 138 piṭṭhesu.
Vi 1. 224 piṭṭhe. 6. Kuṭi eva hi kuṭikāti vuttā. (Sī, Ka)

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/Paṭhamavagga/X/6.text: Paccayādidhammassa anudhammaṁ paṭipanno na mamaṁ dhammādhikaraṇaṁ vihesesi (Sī)

variants.reading: Paccayādidhammassa anudhammaṁ paṭipanno na mamaṁ dhammādhikaraṇaṁ vihesesi

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/Paṭhamavagga/X/6.text: Yaṁ panete bhikkhū tattha tattha therena vuttaṁ (Sī)

variants.reading: Yaṁ panete bhikkhū tattha tattha therena vuttaṁ

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/Paṭhamavagga/X/7.text: Khu 1. 342; Khu 7. 73; Khu 8. 114 piṭṭhesu thokaṁ visadisaṁ.

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/Paṭhamavagga/X/9.text: Mama cintitaṁ gaditaṁ kathitaṁ cintetvā vīmaṁsitaṁ (Sī)

variants.reading: Mama cintitaṁ gaditaṁ kathitaṁ cintetvā vīmaṁsitaṁ

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/Sattamavagga/X/66.text: Sabbadhammāna pāragūti sabbesaṁ vā saṅkhatadhammānaṁ pārabhūtaṁ nibbānaṁ sayambhūñāṇena gato, sabbesaṁ ñeyyadhammānaṁ pāraṁ pariyantaṁ ñāṇagamanena gato adhigatoti sabbadhammāna pāragū, sabbaññūti attho. (Sī)

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/Aṭṭhamavagga/X/73.text: Dukhitanti dukkhitaṁ dukkhasaññuttaṁ (Sī), dukhitanti dukkhitaṁ dukkhasaññitaṁ (Ka)

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/Aṭṭhamavagga/X/75.text: Dassanamevetaṁ vuttaṁ taṁ kho vijjatīti-ādi, tattha (Sī)

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/Aṭṭhamavagga/X/79.text: Abhi 1. 216; Abhi 2. 377 piṭṭhādīsu. 2. Aṭṭhavibhāgo (Sī) 3. Khu 3. 181 piṭṭhe.

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/Dasamavagga/X/92.text: Idaṁ ṭhānaṁ sīsena idaṁ udarena paharitvā idaṁ pakkhehīti (Sī)

variants.reading: Idaṁ ṭhānaṁ sīsena idaṁ udarena paharitvā idaṁ pakkhehīti

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/Ekādasamavagga/X/10.text: Yaṁ yaṁ sāvakena pattabbaṁ, taṁ taṁ (Sī)
Na nūnāyanti na nūnaṁ ayanti padacchedo (Sī)

variants.reading: Na nūnāyanti na nūnaṁ ayanti padacchedo

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/Dvādasamavagga/X/11.text: Gahanañhi atthi rukkhamūlaṁ narukkhamūlañca atthi gahanaṁ (Ka)

variants.reading: Gahanañhi atthi rukkhamūlaṁ narukkhamūlañca atthi gahanaṁ

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/Paṭhamavagga/X/122.text: Nibbatti, tassa bhāradvājoti nāmaṁ ahosi (Sī, I)

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/Paṭhamavagga/X/124.text: Tasmā sā āsā sappurisānaṁ Buddhādīnaṁ na hoti (Sī, I) 2-2. Paṭipajjanato sakkārāsā pahānena pahīṇā hotīti (Sī)

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/Dutiyavagga/X/154.text: Santuṭṭho nissaraṇasampajaññassa (Ka) 2-2. Attano āyasmatā ca nandiyena samaggavāsoti veditabbaṁ (Sī)

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/Tatiyavagga/X/168.text: Passa na saddamevāti (Sī), passa naṁ tadatthamevāti (Ka)

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/Pañcamavagga/X/212.text: Yogāvacarassa yaṁ yaṁ ārammaṇūpanijjhānavasena lakkhaṇūpanijjhānavasena ca jhānaṁ taṁ taṁ jhāya (Sī)

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/Pañcamavagga/X/212.text: Nandamānāgataṁ cittanti nandamānaṁ āgataṁ. Tatratatrābhinandinī yāyaṁ taṇhā, tassā taṁ taṁ bhavaṁ nandamānaṁ abhinandamānaṁ cittaṁ imaṁ bhavāpi bhavaṁ nandamānaṁ ānandamānaṁ āgataṁ uppannaṁ (Sī)

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/Pañcamavagga/X/214.text: Nandamānāgataṁ cittanti nandamānaṁ āgataṁ. Tatratatrābhinandinī yāyaṁ taṇhā, tassā taṁ taṁ bhavaṁ nandamānaṁ abhinandamānaṁ cittaṁ imaṁ bhavāpi bhavaṁ nandamānaṁ ānandamānaṁ āgataṁ uppannaṁ (Sī)

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/Pañcamavagga/X/218.text: Yaṁ vā Buddhānaṁ aniccataṁ disvā yaṁ vā tadanussaraṇā (Sī), yaṁ vā Buddhānaṁ aniccataṁ nissāya tadanusārena (I)

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/Pañcamavagga/X/224.text: Mānasaṁ, taṁ arahattaṁ so vā (Sī, Ka), mānasaṁ, arahattaṁ so (I)
